import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; // Utility component for Gradient Text (consistent styling) const GradientText = ({ children }) => ( {children} ); const Home = () => { // Data arrays for sections (easy to manage/update) const solutions = [ { icon: '💼', title: 'Healthcare Staffing', desc: 'Connecting qualified professionals with leading medical facilities.' }, { icon: '💻', title: 'US/EU Sourcing', desc: 'Specialized talent sourcing for global technical and IT roles.' }, { icon: '⚙️', title: 'Industrial Solutions', desc: 'Expert manpower for manufacturing, engineering & production.' }, { icon: '🍵', title: 'Hospitality & F&B', desc: 'Certified professionals for luxury service and hospitality.' }, { icon: '🧪', title: 'Chemical Sector', desc: 'Experienced technicians for lab and process management.' }, ]; const features = [ { title: '1000+', subtitle: 'Vetted Candidates', icon: '👤' }, { title: 'Trust', subtitle: 'Reliable Partnerships', icon: '🤝' }, { title: 'Global', subtitle: 'Industry Footprint', icon: '🌍' }, { title: 'Quality', subtitle: 'Vetted Talent Pool', icon: '✅' }, { title: 'Tech', subtitle: 'Innovation Driven', icon: '💻' }, { title: 'ROI', subtitle: 'Cost Efficiency', icon: '💰' }, { title: 'Compliance', subtitle: 'Legal Adherence', icon: '📋' }, ]; const expertise = [ { name: 'Oil & Gas', icon: '🛢️', details: ['Upstream', 'Refinement', 'Operations'] }, { name: 'US/EU Staffing', icon: '🗽', details: ['Sourcing', 'Outsourcing', 'Recruitment'] }, { name: 'Hospitality & F&B', icon: '🍵', details: ['Certification', 'Training', 'Operations'] }, ]; return (
{/* 1. HERO SECTION - Dark Gradient Backgroud */}
{/* Subtitle tag */}
Corporate & Industrial Solutions
{/* Main Title - Reference Style */}

Where Talent Meets
Technology

{/* Description */}

Leading manpower solutions across Electronics, Electrical, Chemical, and Oil & Gas sectors. Discover top-tier talent and elevate your business with Hudson.

{/* Call to Actions - Orange Gradients */}
Find Opportunities Discover Talent
{/* 2. OUR SOLUTIONS SECTION - Card Layout */}

Our Solutions

Custom staffing and technical solutions designed for modern enterprise needs.

{solutions.map((item, index) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.desc}

Learn More →
))}
{/* 3. WHY CHOOSE HUDSON (FEATURES) SECTION - Small Icon Grid */}

Why Choose Hudson

{features.map((item, index) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.subtitle}

))}
{/* 4. INDUSTRY EXPERTISE SECTION - Specific Details */}

Industry Expertise

{expertise.map((ind, index) => (
{ind.icon}

{ind.name}

    {ind.details.map(detail => (
  • • {detail}
    • ))}
Learn More
))}
{/* 5. MINIMAL FOOTER SECTION - Reference Style */}
{/* Logo and About */}
HUDSON

Innovative manpower & technical solutions for modern industries.

{/* Links Section */} {[ { title: 'Services', links: ['About', 'Solutions', 'Clients', 'Careers'] }, { title: 'Company', links: ['FAQ', 'Compliance', 'Pricing', 'Legal'] }, { title: 'Connect', links: ['Contact', 'LinkedIn', 'Twitter', 'Facebook'] }, { title: 'Industries', links: ['Electronics', 'Electrical', 'Chemical', 'Oil & Gas'] }, ].map(section => (

{section.title}

    {section.links.map(link => (
  • {link}
    • ))}
))}
{/* Copyright - Reference Style */}
© 2026 Hudson Manpower Solutions. All rights reserved. Your global talent hub.
); }; export default Home;
